title: helianthus striatus
intro: Helianthus striatus, also known as the Striated Sunflower, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, flowers, and roots, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems, due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. Helianthus striatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
